notes: Run 2026-06-20. Mechanics: Before & After (5) + Homophones & Soundalikes (5). Before & After not used since June 18; Homophones rotate fresh pairs. All pairs new — none overlap prior packs.

questions.constraint_text: The answer combines two phrases that share a pivot word.
questions.clue: The bedside comfort that keeps small children from bumping into walls in the dark was also the revolutionary invention that ended the age of gas lamps.

questions.constraint_text: The answer combines two phrases that share a pivot word.
